study_scope: Study all topics available across the uploaded PDFs and knowledge base, but prioritize the topics listed below first.

selection_lens.pdf_guidance: Look into the uploaded PDFs and their subtopics for directional guidance when selecting articles and news.
selection_lens.pdf_usage_rule: Treat the PDF topics and subtopics as inspiration and a relevance map, not as a hard restriction.
selection_lens.article_policy: Only keep fresh articles that help with argument building, framing, comparative analysis, values analysis, institutional critique, stronger speaking points, or intellectual growth.
selection_lens.learning_goal: Use external news and essays to improve debate perspective, argument skill, and deep specification knowledge around the chosen domains.
